modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Telepresence robot at SDSU won't start up properly.

full_description_text: I tried to use the SDSU telepresence robot, but it just won't boot up. I pressed the power button, and nothing happened at all. It's really frustrating because I need it for a project, and I don't know what to do next.
short_description: Telepresence robot at SDSU won't start up properly.
description: I tried to use the SDSU telepresence robot, but it just won't boot up. I pressed the power button, and nothing happened at all. It's really frustrating because I need it for a project, and I don't know what to do next.
